name: ASSAULT PRE-WORKOUT
description_html:
MusclePharm Assault Pre-Workout – Energy, Focus & Endurance for Peak Performance

Power Your Training. Push Beyond Limits.

MusclePharm® Assault™ Energy+Strength is creating the new standard in performance pre-workouts. University studied and designed for athletes, Assault™ provides unmatched energy and boosts performance during intensive workouts. Assault™ features one of the most studied and scientifically proven supplements for gains in Creatine Monohydrate. Also featured is Beta-Alanine that works to buffer lactic acid built up from strenuous exercise, reducing performance fatigue, and prolonging intense workouts. All of this, plus an Explosive Energy & Focus blend to help attack training right out of the gate are what make Assault™ the next level of pre-workout nutrition.

Suggested Use: Mix 1 scoop of Assault Pre-Workout with 8–12 fl. oz. of cold water and consume 20–30 minutes before training. Do not exceed 1 serving in a 24-hour period.

For best results, use in conjunction with a proper diet, regular exercise program, and adequate hydration.

name: Assault Sport By Muscle Pharm
description_html:
Assault is produced by the groundbreaking team at MusclePharm and is one of the most researched pre-workouts and has been developed at their state of the art "Sports Science Center". This unique supplement is different from similar supplements available on the market because it does not leave you feeling busted after taking it. Instead, you will feel supercharged to get through your workout without experiencing the crash associated with taking caffeinated supplements.

This supplement has been designed to target strength, endurance, muscle mass and overall power. After taking Muscle Pharm Assault, you will likely experience longer-lasting pumps after your workout. The ingredients within this supplement have been chosen with care to maximise performance and results using a unique five-stage delivery system. It is the perfect pre-workout supplement to enhance athletic training ability.

When you take Assault Sport by Muscle Pharm, you'll experience:

  • Anti-fatigue/lactic-acid buffer
  • A complete pre-workout
  • “ION-3” patented nitrate technology
  • Explosive energy without the crash
  • Strength and endurance

Assault is a great supplement that encompasses unique matrix complexes that is specific only to this product. The combination of ingredients and careful formulation enhances the product's efficiency once inside the body to give an explosive workout. The energy burst from this pre-workout supplement will last from the beginning of the workout, right until the end. Take Assault Sport before your workout and experience long-lasting energy right up until you leave the gym.

name: BCAA 3:1:2 by Muscle Pharm
description_html:
Both elite athletes and everyday gym trainees endure trauma as a result of physical activity so MusclePharm created this BCAA 3:1:2 branched chain amino acid energy and hydration drink that can be used during training to meet the demands of high intensity training. Its an innovative energy, recovery and sports hydration drink with the ideal mix of l-leucine (three grams), l-valine (two grams) and l-isoleucine (one gram), you’re getting all the important benefits of BCAAs before and after a workout.

Key Benefits

  • "Patent-pending" 3:1:2 BCAA ratio
  • Supports lean mass growth
  • Reduces muscle breakdown


The inside scoop

L-leucine is an essential amino acid that can be obtained by eating meat, dairy products, eggs and other beans. It helps in maintaining muscle mass assists in weight loss and increased levels of high density lipoprotein cholesterol (good cholesterol).

L-isoleucine is an important BCAA that goes along with leucine and L-valine promoting tissue repair normalising blood sugar levels, increasing your energy and endurance to the optimum level.

L-valine is an essential amino acid for cognitive function and it can be found from leafy vegetables, poultry, milk and kidney beans; it also aids in maintaining muscle and regulation of immune system

name: COMBAT 100% WHEY
description_html:
Fast-Digesting Protein Powder for Muscle Growth & Recovery

Ultra-Premium 100% Whey Protein

Combat 100% Whey™ is an ultra-premium blend containing 100% whey protein. Helps maintain lean muscle and replenish nutrients after workouts to fuel muscle recovery and performance that tastes great and mixes easily.

Get More Out Of Every Serving

Every serving of Combat 100% Whey is packed with 24g of 100% whey protein as whey protein isolate and whey protein concentrate that digests quickly to help satisfy daily protein needs. In addition, Combat 100% Whey is low in fats and free of artificial dyes, fillers, gluten, and other undesirable ingredients. Take any time of day, before or after a workout, to fuel the athlete inside with an ultra-premium, quality protein experience.

Suggested use: Mix 1 scoop of Combat 100% Whey Protein with 8-12 fl. oz. of cold water and shake well. Adjust the amount of water to achieve your preferred taste and consistency. Consume additional servings throughout the day to help meet your daily protein goals.

name: COMBAT PROTEIN
description_html:
MusclePharm Combat Protein Powder – 5-Protein Blend for All-Day Muscle Fuel

Fuel Your Muscles. Recover Faster. Perform Better.

MusclePharm Combat Protein Powder is the ultimate choice for athletes who push their limits and expect nothing but the best from their high protein shakes. Each serving of Combat Protein Powder delivers a commanding 25 grams of protein, fueling your muscle to ensure your hard work and dedication yield real results.

Combat Protein is the athlete's complete protein. Masterfully engineered with a premium blend of 5 unique protein sources, including high-quality whey protein powder, protein powder isolate, hydrolysate and concentrate, egg albumin, and milk protein concentrate. Each protein source digests at a different rate. Varying digestion rates, provide comprehensive amino acid infusion. This strategic approach is crucial for efficient muscle growth and recovery. 

Combat Protein is Informed Sport and Informed Protein Certified and manufactured in a cGMP-compliant facility, so every scoop is tested for banned substances and made with quality you can trust.

Suggested Use: Mix 1 scoop with 8–12 fl. oz. of cold water or milk. Shake, blend, or stir and enjoy anytime you need a premium protein boost.

name: COMBAT READY PROTEIN BAR 4 PACK
description_html:
MusclePharm Combat Ready Protein Bars – High-Protein Fuel On the Go

Satisfy Your Cravings. Fuel Your Performance.

MusclePharm Combat Ready Protein Bars are for athletes and fitness enthusiasts looking for a delicious and nutritious way to fuel their bodies. Each soft-baked bar delivers 20 grams of premium protein, sourced from whey isolate and concentrate to support muscle recovery and growth. The Chocolate Cake flavor not only tastes great and helps boost high protein but also satisfies cravings in a healthy way.

What sets these premier protein bars apart is their satisfyingly crispy and chewy texture, achieved through a unique soft-baking process. This process results in a delightful combination of crunchy and chewy layers, making each bar a pleasure to eat.

These baked whey protein bars are an excellent choice for those who need a quick protein boost before or after workouts, and are perfect to take as meal replacement bars or high protein snacks during a busy day. They provide the essential nutrients needed for optimal athletic performance and recovery, making them an ideal addition to any fitness routine.

With MusclePharm's commitment to quality and safety, you can be confident that you're consuming a product that is gluten free and crafted to meet the rigorous standards of athletes who demand the best for their bodies.

MusclePharm Combat Ready Protein Bars are part of the MusclePharm Sport Series, which includes a range of products designed to optimize physical performance, enhance recovery, and support overall wellness. Whether you're a professional athlete, a fitness enthusiast, or just someone looking for healthy snacks, gluten free snacks or high protein food, these deliciously balanced nutrition bars are an excellent choice to help you combat cravings, reach your goals and Unleash Your Potential.

Suggested Use: Enjoy 1 bar post-workout, between meals, or whenever you need a clean, high-protein snack. Perfect to keep in your gym bag, desk, or car for instant, on-the-go fuel.

name: COMBAT READY PROTEIN SHAKE
description_html:
MusclePharm Combat Ready Protein Shakes – Smooth, Ready-to-Drink Muscle Fuel

Grab. Shake. Perform.

Power through your workouts and busy days with MusclePharm Combat Ready High Protein Shakes, the ultimate ready-to-drink (RTD) protein solution for serious athletes and everyday performers. Each 17 fl oz bottle delivers an impressive 40g of high-quality protein, including a precise blend of casein protein and essential amino acids like 8.7g of L-Glutamine and 8g of BCAAs to support lean muscle growth, immune health, and post-workout recovery.

Crafted for on-the-go convenience, these high-protein shakes are perfect whether you’re crushing a training session, rushing to work, or managing a packed schedule.

Suggested use: Enjoy 1 shake post-workout, between meals, or anytime you need quick, high-quality protein. No mixing required—just chill, shake, and drink. Perfect for your gym bag, office, or on-the-go lifestyle.

name: CREATINE-HYDRATE
description_html:
Unleash your true potential with MusclePharm Creatine-Hydrate — a premium creatine monohydrate powder engineered for serious training.

Each serving provides 5 grams of ultra-pure creatine monohydrate, one of the most researched ingredients in sports nutrition. Creatine supports increases in muscle strength and power while helping enhance sports performance during high-intensity exercise.*

But performance requires more than strength alone.

Creatine-Hydrate features a built-in Hydration Complex with key electrolytes to help support fluid balance and optimal hydration during demanding workouts.* Whether you're lifting,

sprinting, or pushing through intense conditioning, this advanced formula helps fuel your drive to win.

• 5g Creatine Monohydrate per serving

• Electrolyte Hydration Support

• 60 Servings • Gluten Free

• Colors Derived from Natural Sources

• Informed Sport Certified

Life is a sport. Live to win.

name: Combat 100% Isolate by MusclePharm
description_html: MusclePharm’s Combat 100% Isolate is scientifically-engineered to deliver 24 grams of 100% whey protein isolate per 27 gram serving - high-quality protein with no added fillers. After an intense workout session, your muscles are starved for nutrients and need true results fast. Isolates are of the most refined protein sources, scientifically filtered to remove fats, sugars, and carbohydrates making them a fast-digesting source of protein and an ideal solution to help deliver superior results.

name: Combat 100% Whey by MusclePharm
description_html:
Are you looking for a high-quality protein powder that is easily absorbed? Muscle Pharm has delivered Combat 100% Whey, a premium blend of WPI and WPC that is low in sugar, fats and carbs. Each scoop of this excellent supplement will give you 25 grams of protein to help you build and maintain lean muscle mass.

Supplement your diet with this excellent whey protein powder to help you achieve your macronutrients easily. The combination of whey protein isolate and whey protein concentrate will give a fast-digestive protein so that you can consume this product before or after your workout.

When you take Combat 100% Whey by Muscle Pharm, you’ll:
  • Build more lean muscle due to the combination of high-quality whey protein isolate and whey protein concentrate.
  • Quickly absorb this protein. Combat 100% Whey is fast absorbed, which will give you the benefits of this great supplement straightaway. You can have it before or after your workout for an instant hit of protein.
  • Digest it quicker with the combination of WPI and WPC. Protein isolate is known for its fast absorption compared to protein concentrate. This is because WPI has low lactose, sugar and fats, making it easier to digest.
  • Get an allergen-free protein. This protein powder is gluten-free and has no artificial dyes or colours.
  • Consume a high-quality protein powder, which will give you a massive 25 grams of protein in each serve.

Have a complete whey protein powder with Combat 100% Whey. You will get the highest absorption rate among any other proteins, as well as a complete amino acid profile of all nine essential aminos.

Each scoop of Combat 100% Whey by Muscle Pharm has:
  • 25g of protein, which is a combination of whey protein isolate and whey protein concentrate
  • 1.5g of fats, which only 0.5g is saturated
  • 2g of carbohydrates, which only 2g is sugar
  • 120mg of sodium, which will give you less water retention
  • No artificial colours or dyes
  • No gluten

Warning: This product is not a sole source of nutrition and should be consumed in conjunction with a nutritious diet and an appropriate training or exercise program. Not suitable for children under 15 years of age or pregnant women: Should only be used under medical or dietetic supervision.

name: Combat Crunch Bars by Muscle Pharm
description_html:
The scientists at MusclePharm understand that you're not always around a tub of protein or a blender so they've created these highly convenient "crunch" bars that are both great tasting and packed with 20 grams of protein. 

Low-sugar Combat Crunch Bar by Muscle Pharm is scientifically developed for peak taste and performance. Packing 15g of protein and just 1g of sugar per bar, it's a guilt-free, crunchy snack ready to fuel your active lifestyle.

When you're constantly "on the go" it can be difficult to maintain the optimum level of nutrient intake that you need to perform at your very best both inside and outside the gym. That's where a carefully designed and well-researched protein bar can be very handy. This is a multi-layer baked treat of a protein bar that rejects the “taffy-like” sports bar approach of the past. 

Key Benefits

  • 20 grams of convenient protein
  • Low sugar and carbs
  • Gluten free

name: Combat Ready RTD Chocolate 17oz Gift

Power through your workouts and busy days with MusclePharm Combat Ready High Protein Shakes, the ultimate choice for protein ready to drink shakes. Whether your focus is building lean muscle, enhancing post workout recovery, or finding a convenient high protein breakfast drink, each MusclePharm Combat Ready protein milk shake is scientifically crafted to give you the tools you need to succeed. Choose MusclePharm’s cutting-edge RTD protein drinks and redefine what’s possible. From high-intensity workouts to busy mornings, Musclepharm high protein snacks deliver the performance and nutrition you need to live a high-performance lifestyle. Embrace the best in healthy high protein drinks and make every sip count to conquer new heights and redefine your limits.

name: Combat Sports Powder by Muscle Pharm
description_html:
MusclePharm have designed this heavily researched protein "superfood" in order to build and maintain quality lean muscle mass, whilst fueling fat loss. Protein is the most important "macronutrient" for muscle growth and power and this product seeks to deliver the vital nutrients all trainees need to meet their demands. 

Like all MusclePharm products, this premium protein product was created out of their state-of-the-art "Sports Science Center" and delivers on a number of benefits. 

Some key benefits

  • Feeds the muscle building and recovery pathways
  • 25 grams of the high-quality protein blend, in a great tasting, easy-to-mix shake
  • Added "digestive blend" to ease absorption

What's inside combat powder? 

Whey Protein Isolate (WPI)

WPI is rapidly digested and absorbed.

Partially hydrolysed whey protein

This hydrolysed protein is the king of speed when it comes to proteins it provides a lightning-fast infusion of muscle-growth aminos.

Micellar casein

Micellar casein is a slow-digesting protein that delivers amino acids over a number of hours, which may assist in muscle tissue protection.

Whey Protein Concentrate (WPC)

This protein concentrate contains "real food" subfractions and is closer to "whole-food" than other whey proteins. 

Egg albumin protein

Egg albumin has a high BCAA content and arginine and has been associated with both hormone production and muscle growth.

Added BCAAs and glutamine also fortify the muscle-building and recovery properties of this, our most technologically advanced protein super food available.

This Combat product is available at Nutrition Warehouse in a 1.8kg size in Banana Cream, Chocolate Milk, Chocolate Peanut Butter, Cinnamon Bun, Cookies & Cream, Orange Creamsicle, Smores, Triple Berry and Vanilla flavours.

name: Creatine by Muscle Pharm
description_html:
This creatine product from MusclePharm has an enhanced uptake ability in addition to high bioavailablity. With its clinically backed cinnulin further heightening absorption, its five creatine complexes deliver a range of positive benefits that fire directly into the muscle. This is an ideal agent for boosting explosive energy and power.

What's inside this creatine product?

This is a "five-blend" creatine solution. 

Creatine Alpha-Amino-N-Butyrate (Creatine AAB)

  • Absorption of ingredients is supported
  • Provides anti-catabolic support
  • The AAB assists with protein production and prevents degradation

Di-creatine Malate

  • High availability and ATP formulation
  • Highly soluble creatine agent
  • Promotes muscle strength and growth
  • Lactic acid fighter

Creatine "Magnapower" (Creatine Magnesium Chelate)

  • Magnapower maximises creatine storage and muscle uptake
  • More active creatine bang for your buck

Creatine Monohydrate

  • Purest form of creatine monohydrate
  • Supports increased training capacity and muscle mass

Creatine Nitrate

  • Most water soluble form of creatine
  • Helps increase vasodilation
  • Maximised absorption for muscle pumps

name: Crisp Protein Bar by Muscle Pharm
description_html:
Ready for a new spin on a protein bar? By now you’ve probably tried a good 10-20 different protein bars on the market. With many to choose from, you’ve found your favourite.

That’s about to change. If you’re getting tired of the same old, same old when it comes to a protein bar, Crisp Protein Bar by Muscle Pharm is going to change that. They’ve revolutionised what a protein bar looks like and now you can sink your teeth into a bar that will take you back to your childhood.

Designed to be closer to that Rice Crispy treat you had back in grade school, these are a refreshing new take on the traditional bars you’ve come to know.

Some of the great benefits you’ll receive when using Crisp Protein Bar’s by Muscle Pharm include:
  • A lower calorie treat. While some protein bars on today’s market are getting up there and come in around 220-250 calories per bar, these are only 170 calories, making them a great option for those who are on strict low calorie diets
  • Absolutely no trans fats so you get a fat profile that you can feel good about putting into your body
  • A good dose of dietary fibre to help keep you feeling full for hours after you eat the bar and to also help lower cholesterol and promote regularity
  • Only one gram of sugar alcohols so you don’t need to worry about severe gastrointestinal upset after eating these bars (many people do not react well to sugar alcohols)
  • Made with a high quality protein blend including whey protein isolate and whey protein concentrate)
  • Offers a good dose of protein to help with muscle rebuilding and repair
  • Available in delicious flavors that almost everyone will enjoy
  • Low sugar content so you can keep your blood glucose levels in check.
  • Easy to carry around so they can provide that perfect snack any time you need them

Crisp Protein Bar by Muscle Pharm is a bar that you will remember. With it’s crispy texture and sweet taste, it’ll feel like you’re eating dessert every time.

In each Crisp Protein Bar you’ll take in:
  • 170 calories, which is a very reasonable level
  • Just 5 grams of fat with 3 of them coming from saturated sources
  • 10 mg of cholesterol
  • 17 grams of carbs with just 6 grams of sugar
  • 4 grams of dietary fibre
  • 16 grams of protein to help you with muscle recovery

Next time hunger hits, reach for Crisp Protein Bar by Muscle Pharm and liven up your day.

Promote muscular performance, efficient recovery and take command of your body's potential with our daily Fish Oil supplement. Daily replenishment of Omega 3 fatty acids is fundamental to the vitality of crucial bodily processes including heart, brain, immune system & joint function. Adding our Omega 3 Supplement to your daily routine ensures your body is primed to gain the full benefits of the work you put in. 

Our Fish Oil Supplements for men and women are NSF Certified, banned substance tested, and made & sealed in a GMP-certified facility. The softgels are secured with an enteric coating to ensure maximum impact and absorption while banishing any fishy aftertaste or digestive discomfort.

For those who demand the best from their bodies and minds, MusclePharm Essentials Series features a family of fundamental nutrients including MusclePharm Creatine, Glutamine, BCAA, Multi-V+ Multivitamin, and Elite Omega 3 Fish Oil. ✔ 25g of High-Quality Whey Protein – Supports muscle recovery and lean muscle growth.

name: MusclePharm Combat Protein Powder 2lbs
description_html:
Fuels Muscles & Performance for hours!

This is 25 Grams of High-Quality Protein in a Tasty, Easy-To-Mix Shake, Formulated for Athletes and Active People.

People who train hard demand a superior and more effective protein. To maximize lean muscle growth and recovery ensuring proper protein utilization, MusclePharm® scientists fortified Combat Protein Powder® with a variety of protein blends that digest at varying rates—this helps fuel your muscles longer. name: PRO SERIES ENDURA-DRIVE
description_html:
MusclePharm Endura-Drive – Advanced Endurance & Electrolyte Fuel

1.6lb 30 servings

Hydrate. Sustain Energy. Maximize Performance.

ENDURA-DRIVE is a pro-grade stim-free intra workout amino complex featuring a cutting-edge, endurance enhancing blend of premium science-backed ingredients which help boost nitric oxide production, support hydration, electrolyte balance and deliver nootropics for pre workout focus, intra workout energy & post workout recovery.

Each scoop of ENDURA-DRIVE’s 7-in-1 composition offers:

  • 5g BCAAs (2:1:1 Complex): L Leucine, L Isoleucine, and L Valine, the essential building blocks for muscle recovery. These branched chain amino acids (BCAAs) reduce muscle breakdown and support lean muscle growth during intense training sessions.
  • 2.9g EAAs: A full spectrum of Essential Amino Acids, including L Lysine HCI, helps optimize protein synthesis, improve recovery, and support endurance.
  • 2g Beta Alanine: Buffers lactic acid buildup, helping you push through longer, moreintense workouts
  • .1.5g Taurine: Enhances cellular energy levels and electrolyte balance.
  • 2.5g L Glutamine: Supports gut health and immune health and speeds up recovery after strenuous exercise.
  • 50mg S7 Nitric Oxide Booster: Supports nitric oxide levels, for the muscle pumps
    athletes crave.
  • 500mg Nootropics: Sharpens focus and clarity to help you stay locked in during your workout.

Take ENDURA-DRIVE anytime of day, before, during or after workouts to help drive focus, clarity and more effective workouts: Every scoop delivers the amino acids, electrolytes and stim free workout support needed to help you stay locked-in. The powder dissolves completely in water and is refreshingly satisfying.

Tested for quality and transparency, Pro Series ENDURA-DRIVE amino energy powder is Informed Sport Certified, tested for label claim accuracy and banned substances. It contains zero added sugar, is caffeine-free and gluten-free. Our full disclosure labeling ensures serious athletes can consume with confidence. Refer to our label for clear & precise formulation details.

Unleash Your Maximum Potential with MusclePharm Pro Series cutting-edge innovation. Our premium, science-backed formulas are designed for elite athletes to maximize performance, dominate the competition, and achieve peak potential without compromise.

Suggested Use: Mix 1 scoop with 12–16 fl. oz. of cold water. Consume before, during, or after exercise to support hydration, energy, and recovery.

Protein Powder for Men & Women Seeking Real Results

name: Wreckage by Muscle Pharm
description_html:
MusclePharm Wreckage is an elite pre-workout formula designed for athletes who are looking to take their performance beyond their natural capacity and into a world of advanced human potential.

  • Neuro Excitation
  • Advanced Vascularity
  • Anaerobic Enhancement

With chief scientists and developers working one on one with high end, elite and professional athletes, MusclePharm knows what athletes need!

Utilising only highly efficacious and clinically studied, cutting edge ingredients, MusclePharm Wreckage provides complete physiological and psychological human enhancement.

Core Ingredients

Intense Pump & Nutrient Absorption

Combining L-Citrulline with patented Green Tea extract technology in Vaso6, alongside astrigin, the Pump and Nutrient matrix is designed to maximise peripheral vasodilation, leading to intensified muscular pumps and enhanced nutrient delivery.

Energy & Endurance

At 300mg of caffeine per scoop and 2g of Beta Alanine, the Energy and Endurance blend works on two primary performance enhancing principles in ensuring CNS stimulation is optimised as well as physical performance and fatigue are minimised.

Beta Alanine works by removing toxic by-products of exercise, essentially increasing anerobic endurance while caffeine increases performance and simultaneously reduces perceived fatigue.

Neuro Focus

With 4 key ingredients in Tyrosine, Alpha GPC, Theanine and NeuroFactor, the Neuro focus blend stimulates the release of key mood and cognitive enhancing neurotransmitters such as Dopamine and Acetyl Choline, while simultaneously providing a sense of calmness as well.

This leaves you feeling intensely focused and cognitively primed but without the jitters and common anxiogenic behaviours.

Final Thoughts

Wreckage is 100% banned substance FREE and is designed to increase both mental and physical performance but without risking your health!
